title: Satellite Speakers
subtitle: Manage ESP32 satellite speakers connected to this hub
no_sats: No satellites paired yet. Use "Add Satellite" to get started.
name: Name
wiz_step1_hint: Power on the ESP32 satellite and hold the pairing button for 3 seconds until the LED blinks blue.
wiz_step2_hint: Tap the satellite you want to add.
wiz_step3_hint: The satellite will join this network and connect back to the hub.
wiz_step4_hint: Give the satellite a name and assign it to a room.
scan_empty: No satellites found. Check the satellite is in pairing mode.
ota_stub: Firmware upload will be available in a future release.
